description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-avatar

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-avatar/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 100 (A) — No issues.

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens only. No hardcoded values. Three-tier cascade. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Alt text for images. Fallback initials. ARIA labels.
3. **Functionality** — Image loading/error fallback. Initials generation. Size variants. Shape variants. Status indicator.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Responsive sizing.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Verify 100 score holds.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Image error fallback. Initials. Sizes.
8. **Storybook** — All sizes/shapes/states. Image + fallback demos.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Twig-friendly. User profile integration.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-avatar
